sections.paragraph: Gen 43:11 Jerem. 8:22 46:11 51:8 in pause צֹרִי: Eze 27:17 once with Vav copul. וּצְרִי Gen 37:25, m. opobalsamum, the balsam distilling from a tree or fruit growing in Gilead, used for the healing of wounds, from the root צָרָה which see. It is not ascertained what tree this may have been; see Bochart, Hieroz., t. i. p. 628. Celsii Hierobot., ii. 180-185; and on the other hand, J. D. Michaëlis (Supplemm. page 2142), Warnekros (Repertorium für Morgenl. Litt., vol. xv. p. 227); and Jahn (Archæol., t. i. p. 83).
